summary: PR #2327 updates only src/melee/mp/mpisland.c, replacing generated-looking collision island logic with typed map/collision structures, HSD_ASSERT uses, clearer locals, and a new implementation of mpIsland_8005B004. Bot report evidence shows mpisland text/data improvements, including mpIsland_8005B004 from 0.00% to 94.81%, mpIsland_8005A728 from 53.62% to 90.36%, mpIsland_8005ACE8 to 100%, and mpisland .sdata/.sdata2 to 100%. PR body is only 'tracking PR' and there are no review comments.

key_files.role: Only changed file; refactors mpIsland_8005A728, completes small cleanup in mpIsland_8005ACE8, moves mpIsland_804D8158 declaration, and adds a body for mpIsland_8005B004.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: include <baselib/debug.h>, static float mpIsland_804D8158 near globals, mpIsland_8005A728 rewrite, mpIsland_8005B004 body

what_changed.text: Added <baselib/debug.h> so mpisland.c can use HSD_ASSERT instead of raw __assert expansions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __assert blocks replaced by HSD_ASSERT(62, mpisp), HSD_ASSERT(0x3E, mpisp), HSD_ASSERT(0x206, !loop)

what_changed.text: Moved static float mpIsland_804D8158 from below mpIsland_8005ACE8 to the global-data area near mpIsland_80458E88.
Rewrote mpIsland_8005A728 from temp-heavy/raw-offset code into typed MapCollData, CollLine, CollVtx, and mp_UnkStruct0 accesses with separate floor and ceiling segment processing.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mpIsland_8005A728 local declarations changed to MapCollData* map, CollLine* lines, CollVtx* vtx, mp_UnkStruct0* mpisp/prev
raw_diff: lines[end_idx].x0->next_id0, prev_id0, hi_flags, v0_idx, v1_idx
raw_diff: mpisp->x20, next, x24, x26, x4, x6, x8, x14, x28 assignments

what_changed.text: Added a source body for mpIsland_8005B004, replacing a placeholder comment. The body separates existing list nodes by joint, scans dynamic collision lines with a visited bitmap, handles loop/non-loop cases, allocates or reuses mp_UnkStruct0 nodes, and fills endpoints/vertices/z values.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cur/prev/next list split, memzero(visited, 0x600u), inner->dynamic_start/dynamic_count scan
raw_diff: after_alloc label, HSD_MemAlloc(0x2C), mpisp field assignments

what_changed.text: Changed declaration order in mpIsland_8005ACE8 by moving CollJoint* temp_r3 before bool var_r27.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: CollJoint* temp_r3 moved above bool var_r27

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded mpisland improvements: mpIsland_8005B004 reached 94.81%, mpIsland_8005A728 reached 90.36%, mpIsland_8005ACE8 reached 100%, and mpisland .sdata/.sdata2 reached 100%. The same bot report also contains unrelated itsamusgrapple changes not reflected in changed_files.

smart_moves.text: The rewrite replaces raw pointer casts and generated vXX temporaries with typed map, line, vertex, and island-node fields, making collision traversal reviewable while preserving matching progress.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added MapCollData, CollLine, CollVtx, mp_UnkStruct0 field-based code

smart_moves.text: The implementation keeps repeated traversal patterns as loops over collision links and a visited bitmap rather than retaining repeated generated blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: while/for loops over floor, ceiling, and dynamic line traversal

smart_moves.text: Raw assert expansions were folded into HSD_ASSERT after including baselib/debug.h.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_ASSERT(62, mpisp), HSD_ASSERT(0x3E, mpisp), HSD_ASSERT(0x206, !loop)

decomp_lessons.lesson: For mp collision code, replacing decompiler temps and pointer arithmetic with known structures like MapCollData, CollLine, CollVtx, CollJoint, MapJoint, and mp_UnkStruct0 can substantially improve reviewability and still improve matching.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report mpIsland_8005A728 and mpIsland_8005B004 improvements

decomp_lessons.lesson: Visited-bitset traversal over linked collision lines is a reusable shape for grouping floor, ceiling, and dynamic segments while avoiding duplicate processing.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: u8 visited[0x600] in both functions
raw_diff: visited[end_idx] = 1 and skip already visited dynamic lines

decomp_lessons.lesson: When raw __assert output identifies ordinary allocation guards, converting to HSD_ASSERT with baselib/debug.h is consistent with accepted assert cleanup practice.

naming_conventions.text: Clear local role names used in this PR include map, lines, vtx, mpisp, prev, cur, next, count, line_idx, end_idx, start_idx, end_total, type_flag, link, z_val, min_x, max_x, and visited.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mpIsland_8005A728 and mpIsland_8005B004 local declarations

naming_conventions.text: Address-style names remain for not-yet-semantic globals/functions such as mpIsland_804D8158, mpIsland_80458E88, mpIsland_8005A728, and mpIsland_8005B004.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in both rewritten functions to preserve stack shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: PR evidence includes bot score improvements but no inline explanation or objdiff details specifically justifying PAD_STACK.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration order was adjusted in mpIsland_8005ACE8, with a bot report showing the function reached 100%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: CollJoint* temp_r3 moved in local declarations
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No reviewer or author comment explains the exact codegen reason.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A label/goto pair remains in mpIsland_8005B004 around loop assertion and allocation flow.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No objdiff excerpt explains whether the goto is required for matching.

follow_up_queries: mpIsland_8005A728 mpIsland_80458E88 x8 xC prev ceiling
CollLine x0 next_id0 prev_id0 hi_flags v0_idx v1_idx

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR #2327 title mpIsland, MERGED, author jurrejelle, one changed file
notes: Changed-file and diff evidence are strong for what source changed.
There are no review comments and no author explanation beyond 'tracking PR', so intent and rationale are inferred only from code changes and bot report.

Bot report includes many itsamusgrapple matches even though changed_files lists only src/melee/mp/mpisland.c; intake treats those as noisy branch/report context and does not attribute them to this file's diff.
No local build log, objdiff excerpt, or reviewer acceptance rationale is loaded beyond the bot percentage report and merged metadata.
PAD_STACK and goto/declaration-order tactics are recorded as tactics with caveats, not promoted as generally accepted style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed mp collision structures instead of raw offset reconstruction when available
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mpisland.c, using MapCollData, CollLine, CollVtx, CollJoint, MapJoint, and mp_UnkStruct0 fields replaced generated pointer arithmetic and coincided with mpIsland_8005A728 and mpIsland_8005B004 matching improvements.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typed rewrites in mpIsland_8005A728 and mpIsland_8005B004

accepted_candidate_records.title: Visited collision-line traversal can express island segment grouping cleanly
accepted_candidate_records.text: Both mpIsland_8005A728 and mpIsland_8005B004 use a 0x600-byte visited array and link traversal through next_id0/prev_id0 to group line segments without retaining generated repeated blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: visited[0x600] and memzero in both functions
raw_diff: traversal using next_id0/prev_id0 and flags

source_update_candidates.title: Check whether bot report attribution for PR #2327 includes unrelated branch changes
source_update_candidates.text: The bot report lists many itsamusgrapple matches, but changed_files metadata lists only src/melee/mp/mpisland.c. Curator may want source-corpus notes or ingestion filters to mark those report rows as noisy/non-local to the changed file.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report includes main/melee/it/items/itsamusgrapple rows
source_update_candidates.reason: Prevents future searches from over-attributing unrelated itsamusgrapple matches to this mpisland-only diff.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK use from this PR as a general standard; loaded evidence does not include narrow objdiff justification.
Do not claim mpIsland_8005A728 or mpIsland_8005B004 fully matched; bot report shows 90.36% and 94.81%, respectively.
Do not infer reviewer intent or requested changes; there are zero loaded review comments.
Do not attribute the itsamusgrapple matches in the bot report to src/melee/mp/mpisland.c changes.
